# BVI Crypto License

> BVI Crypto License is a specialist consultancy for BVI VASP registration under the VASP Act 2022. Powered by X24Consulting OÜ — 8 years of crypto licensing experience, now extending into established offshore jurisdictions.

## Company

- **Brand:** BVI Crypto License
- **Parent:** Consulting24 (https://consulting24.co/)
- **Legal entity:** X24Consulting OÜ (private limited company)
- **Estonian Business Register code:** 16971898
- **Registered address:** Poordi tn 3-63, Kesklinna linnaosa, 10156 Tallinn, Harju maakond, Estonia
- **Founder & CEO:** Mardo Soo — https://www.linkedin.com/in/mardo-s-00a05ab0/
- **Phone:** +372 58155779
- **Email:** mardo@consulting24.co

## Jurisdiction overview

- **Jurisdiction:** British Virgin Islands
- **Regulator:** BVI Financial Services Commission (FSC)
- **License/registration type:** BVI Virtual Asset Service Provider (VASP) registration under VASP Act 2022

## Key facts

- **Total setup cost:** $30,000–$70,000 USD
- **BVI FSC application fee:** $10,000–$25,000 (class-dependent)
- **Min. paid-up capital:** $0 (operational financial resources required)
- **Timeline:** 3–6 months
- **BVI corporate tax:** 0% (offshore)
- **Required directors:** 1+ (any nationality)

## When this jurisdiction is the right fit

- Operators wanting credible offshore framework (vs purely offshore alternatives)
- Premium offshore brands valuing 50+ year BVI financial-services pedigree
- Asset-management or custody-focused operators (Class 1)
- Token issuance / ICO advisory (Class 3)

## When this jurisdiction is NOT the right fit

- EU retail crypto operators (no MiCA passport — Lithuania needed)
- Bootstrapped operators (Panama or El Salvador cheaper)
- Speed-to-market plays (Canada MSB faster)
- US-licensed money transmitter operators

## Comparable jurisdictions

- **Lithuania CASP (MiCA):** $50K–$120K setup, 4–8 months, €125K capital, EU passport. https://mardo89.github.io/lithuania-vasp-license/
- **Canada MSB (FINTRAC):** $8K–$25K setup, 3–6 weeks, $0 capital, North American fiat rails. https://mardo89.github.io/canada-msb-license/
- **Panama crypto:** $15K–$45K setup, 6–12 weeks, $0 capital, territorial tax. https://mardo89.github.io/panama-crypto-license/

## Source disclosures

Information here reflects May 2026 conditions and is general guidance, not legal advice. Regulations change — confirm with qualified counsel before acting.
